channel.title: re9guide.it.com — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9) Complete Guide
channel.description: Comprehensive fan-made RE9 / Resident Evil Requiem guide. 710+ walkthroughs, tier lists, character analysis, trophies, and lore.

item.title: RE9 ARK Facility Complete Area Guide. Finale + 4 Bosses + All 8 Endings
item.description: Complete RE9 ARK Facility finale walkthrough: Plant 43 -> The Commander -> Chunk Final -> Victor Gideon. Vivien’s Lab reveal, all 8 endings paths, QTE parry. v1.02.

item.title: ARK Facility Walkthrough — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)
item.description: Complete RE9 walkthrough for the ARK Facility: Plant 43 courtyard, The Commander interior, lab collectibles, Victor Gideon final boss, loadout and NG+ tips.

item.title: RE9 Raccoon City Complete Area Guide. RPD + Mr. X + Titan Spinner
item.description: Complete RE9 Raccoon City area walkthrough: RPD Main Hall RE2 replica, Mr. X / Super Tyrant boss, Orphanage Silver Pendant, Titan Spinner. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Rhodes Hill Complete Area Guide; Care Center + Boss Fights
item.description: Complete RE9 Rhodes Hill area walkthrough: Care Center records, Organless Corpse puzzle, Courtyard stealth, Water Treatment + The Girl boss. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Wrenwood Complete Area Guide, Opening Hotel + First Chunk Encounter
item.description: Complete RE9 Wrenwood area walkthrough: opening tutorial, Survivor’s Will charm location, first Chunk stealth encounter, fuse box puzzle. Updated v1.02.

item.title: RE9 990-TAC Shotgun Complete Guide; Alt Shotgun for Hordes + One-Shot Builds
item.description: Complete 990-TAC shotgun guide: 500 close damage, 4-shell mag, slug rounds option, best for hordes and Insanity one-shot kills. Compared to W870 Police. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Brass Whistle Complete Guide; Stealth Distraction + Drone Skip
item.description: Complete Brass Whistle guide: utility item for stealth runs, distracts enemies + drones for 4 seconds, infinite uses. Best in Chapter 4 Courtyard. v1.02.

item.title: Care Center Basement Walkthrough — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)
item.description: Complete RE9 Care Center Basement walkthrough, organless corpse puzzle, blood specimen analyzer, Chunk #2 boss, Quartz puzzle pieces. Lab section guide.

item.title: Rhodes Hill Care Center Walkthrough — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)
item.description: Complete RE9 Rhodes Hill Care Center walkthrough, West Wing The Chef, East Wing Chunk #1, safes, antique coins, Mr. Raccoon locations. Grace + Leon handoff.

item.title: RE9 Clatter Carbine Complete Guide. The Only Assault Rifle + Crowd Control King
item.description: Complete Clatter Carbine guide: only assault rifle in RE9, 60-round mag, 150 dmg per shot, full-auto fire. Best for Plant 43 swarm + Chunk arm break. v1.02.

item.title: Care Center Courtyard Walkthrough — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)
item.description: Complete RE9 Care Center Courtyard walkthrough; Blister-borne boss strategy, fountain Quartz puzzle, antique coins, safe #3, sewer transition to Raccoon City.

item.title: RE9 Flame Rounds Complete Guide; Plant 43 Phase 2 Skip + DoT Stack
item.description: Complete Flame Rounds guide: specialized ammo for Grenade Launcher, deals fire DoT, skips Plant 43 phase 2 entirely. 12 rounds per playthrough. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Grenade Launcher Complete Guide. Crowd Control + Plant 43 Skip
item.description: Complete Grenade Launcher guide: AOE damage, 4 grenade types (frag, flame, slow, EMP), best for Titan Spinner + Plant 43 phase 2 skip. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Hand Cannon Prototype Complete Guide, Grace’s Exclusive Heavy Weapon
item.description: Complete Hand Cannon Prototype guide: Grace exclusive, 350 base damage, single-shot reload. Found in Vivien lab. Best vs Plant 43 + final boss phase 1. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Hatchet Complete Guide, Alt Melee Weapon vs Mortal Edge
item.description: Complete RE9 Hatchet guide: higher base damage than Mortal Edge but smaller parry window. 130 base damage, 0.3s parry. Found in Care Center storage. v1.02.

item.title: Insanity Chapter Walkthrough, Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)
item.description: Chapter-by-chapter RE9 walkthrough on Insanity difficulty. Ammo discipline, parry timing, boss strategy, and save routing for the full campaign; Care Center to ARK Facility.

item.title: RE9 Match Pistol Complete Guide, Leon’s Exclusive Sidearm
item.description: Complete Match Pistol guide: Leon exclusive sidearm, 85 base damage, ×3 headshot, target sights upgrade. Best for Leon stealth-combat hybrid runs. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Mortal Edge Complete Guide. S-Tier Parry Tool + Knife-Only Run Weapon
item.description: Complete Mortal Edge guide for RE9: best melee weapon, forgiving parry window, +30% damage with Knife Edge charm. Knife-only Insanity run weapon. v1.02 verified mechanics.

item.title: Raccoon City Walkthrough — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)
item.description: Complete RE9 Raccoon City Square walkthrough. Titan Spinner boss strategy, district map, Mr. Raccoon collectibles, hidden antique coins, ARK Facility approach.

item.title: RE9 Missables Complete Guide — All Missable Collectibles, Trophies & Events
item.description: Complete RE9 missables checklist. every collectible, trophy, one-time event, and chapter-locked item in Resident Evil Requiem. 8-chapter missable map to never miss anything on your first run.

item.title: RE9 New Game Plus Guide 2026, Carryover, Rewards, Best Order
item.description: Complete RE9 NG+ guide: what carries over (weapons, ammo, charms), exclusive unlocks (Infinite Requiem Revolver, costumes), hidden items, and optimal 5-playthrough Platinum order. Updated May 2026.

item.title: RE9 Requiem Revolver Complete Guide, S-Tier Weapon Stats + Locations + Loadouts
item.description: Complete Requiem Revolver guide for RE9: base damage 250, headshot ×3.5, unlocks Chapter 2, T3 upgrade path, charm pairings, Insanity NG+ Infinite Magnum unlock. Signature S-tier weapon. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Requiem Sniper Rifle Complete Guide, Leon’s Exclusive Long Range
item.description: Complete Requiem Sniper Rifle guide: Leon exclusive, 400 base damage at any range, ×5 headshot. Best vs Titan Spinner + ARK approach. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Rocket Launcher Complete Guide, NG+ Insanity Exclusive One-Shot
item.description: Complete Rocket Launcher guide: NG+ Insanity only, one-shot kills most bosses, 4 total ammo per playthrough. Best vs Victor Gideon final phase. v1.02.

item.title: RPD & Orphanage Walkthrough — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)
item.description: Complete RE9 RPD & Orphanage walkthrough; Mr. X first encounter, evidence room safe, Kendo gun shop, RPD East Wing files, orphanage save room. Leon's pivot chapter.

item.title: RE9 Silencer 9 Pistol Complete Guide, Best Silenced Sidearm + Stealth Build
item.description: Complete Silencer 9 pistol guide: silenced shots don’t alert enemies, 60 base damage, T3 upgrade 90 damage, 12 mag size. Best for stealth builds. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Special Magnum Complete Guide; Leon’s Exclusive Heavy Sidearm
item.description: Complete Special Magnum guide: Leon exclusive, 300 damage per shot, 4-round mag, ×4 headshot. Better than standard Magnum on Insanity. Found in Raccoon City. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 S&S M232 Handgun Complete Guide; Grace’s Exclusive Tier-A Sidearm
item.description: Complete S&S M232 handgun guide: Grace exclusive, 90 base damage, stagger normal zombies, post-stabilizer upgrade. Best Grace sidearm. v1.02.

item.title: RE9 Stun Gun Complete Guide. Mr. X Stagger Tool + Boss Setup
item.description: Complete Stun Gun guide: electrocutes enemies for 2 seconds, perfect Mr. X stagger setup, no damage but enables Magnum follow-up. v1.02.

item.title: Chapter 1 Cutscenes Walkthrough · re9guide.it.com
item.description: Chapter 1 Cutscenes Walkthrough
